aweme_info.content_desc: ["OpenAl is reportedly preparing to launch GPT-5.6 Sol publicly on Thursday, alongside Terra and Luna. Sol is the flagship Al model, while Terra is built as the balanced option and Luna is the lower-cost version.","The timing matters because OpenAl has been under pressure from Anthropic, Google, and xAl, with each company racing to claim the top model spot. This also follows a limited preview period, where access was restricted before a wider release.","If the rollout happens as expected, this could quickly reset the Al leaderboard again.","Which model do you think will lead next?","Source: OpenAl, Reuters"]
aweme_info.desc: OpenAl is reportedly preparing to launch GPT-5.6 Sol publicly on Thursday, alongside Terra and Luna. Sol is the flagship Al model, while Terra is built as the balanced option and Luna is the lower-cost version. The timing matters because OpenAl has been under pressure from Anthropic, Google, and xAl, with each company racing to claim the top model spot. This also follows a limited preview period, where access was restricted before a wider release. If the rollout happens as expected, this could quickly reset the Al leaderboard again. Which model do you think will lead next? Source: OpenAl, Reuters

original_client_text.markup_text:
OpenAl is reportedly preparing to launch GPT-5.6 Sol publicly on Thursday, alongside Terra and Luna. Sol is the flagship Al model, while Terra is built as the balanced option and Luna is the lower-cost version.
The timing matters because OpenAl has been under pressure from Anthropic, Google, and xAl, with each company racing to claim the top model spot. This also follows a limited preview period, where access was restricted before a wider release.
If the rollout happens as expected, this could quickly reset the Al leaderboard again.
Which model do you think will lead next?
Source: OpenAl, Reuters

aweme_info.content_desc: ["Introducing a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier model, as well as GPT-5.6 Terra, a balanced model for efficient, everyday work, and GPT-5.6 Luna, a fast and affordable model for high-volume work.","","We believe in broad access and plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks. For now, at the request of the U.S. government, we’re starting with a limited preview among a small group of trusted partners in Codex and the API.","","Sol is our new flagship and a step function better than GPT-5.5. Terra delivers performance competitive to GPT-5.5 at 2x lower cost. Luna is our most cost-efficient model, delivering strong capability at our lowest cost. Together, the GPT-5.6 family gives people and developers more choice in how they balance intelligence, speed, and cost.","","GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art on Terminal‑Bench 2.1, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning, iteration, and tool coordination.","","GPT-5.6 Sol is our most capable model yet for cybersecurity. It shifts the performance-efficiency frontier for long-horizon security tasks including vulnerability research and exploitation."]
aweme_info.desc: Introducing a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier model, as well as GPT-5.6 Terra, a balanced model for efficient, everyday work, and GPT-5.6 Luna, a fast and affordable model for high-volume work. We believe in broad access and plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks. For now, at the request of the U.S. government, we’re starting with a limited preview among a small group of trusted partners in Codex and the API. Sol is our new flagship and a step function better than GPT-5.5. Terra delivers performance competitive to GPT-5.5 at 2x lower cost. Luna is our most cost-efficient model, delivering strong capability at our lowest cost. Together, the GPT-5.6 family gives people and developers more choice in how they balance intelligence, speed, and cost. GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art on Terminal‑Bench 2.1, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning, iteration, and tool coordination. GPT-5.6 Sol is our most capable model yet for cybersecurity. It shifts the performance-efficiency frontier for long-horizon security tasks including vulnerability research and exploitation.

matched_pgc_sound.author: Tyler Hood
matched_pgc_sound.mixed_title: INTERESTELLAR (Contains music from: After Hour beautiful - Tyler Hood)
matched_pgc_sound.title: After Hour beautiful

original_client_text.markup_text:
Introducing a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier model, as well as GPT-5.6 Terra, a balanced model for efficient, everyday work, and GPT-5.6 Luna, a fast and affordable model for high-volume work.

We believe in broad access and plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks. For now, at the request of the U.S. government, we’re starting with a limited preview among a small group of trusted partners in Codex and the API.

Sol is our new flagship and a step function better than GPT-5.5. Terra delivers performance competitive to GPT-5.5 at 2x lower cost. Luna is our most cost-efficient model, delivering strong capability at our lowest cost. Together, the GPT-5.6 family gives people and developers more choice in how they balance intelligence, speed, and cost.

GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art on Terminal‑Bench 2.1, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning, iteration, and tool coordination.

GPT-5.6 Sol is our most capable model yet for cybersecurity. It shifts the performance-efficiency frontier for long-horizon security tasks including vulnerability research and exploitation.

aweme_info.search_desc: ...GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier model, as well as GPT-5.6 Terra, a balanced model for efficient, everyday work, and GPT-5.6 Luna, a fast and affordable model for high-volume work. We believe in broad access and plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks. For now, at the request of the U.S. government, we’re starting with a limited preview among a small group of trusted partners in Codex and the API. Sol is our new flagship and a step function better than GPT-5.5. Terra delivers performance competitive to GPT-5.5 at 2x lower cost. Luna is our most cost-efficient model, delivering strong capability at our lowest cost. Together, the GPT-5.6 family gives people and developers more choice in how they balance intelligence, speed, and cost. GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art on Terminal‑Bench 2.1, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning, iteration, and tool coordination. GPT-5.6 Sol is our most capable model yet for cybersecurity. It shifts the performance-efficiency frontier for long-horizon security tasks including vulnerability research and exploitation.

aweme_info.content_desc: ["July 9th, 2026 - an intense day for global technology and medicine. OpenAI is finally rolling out GPT-5.6 after months of federal review, signaling a massive leap in accessible AI capabilities. Meanwhile, China is accelerating its semiconductor independence, with domestic chip suppliers now capturing nearly half of the market budget.","In other breakthroughs, the integration of robotics into medicine hits a milestone as humanoid robots complete their first systematic laparoscopic surgery trials. Plus, Meta is blurring lines with its new image generator, while Fortera marks a major shift in autonomous defense tech on the ground in Ukraine. Whether it is psilocybin treatment efficacy or the Treasury Department’s warning about a potential AI market bubble, the pace of change is compounding.","Watch the full episode here: https://youtu.be/6siDevxZPVs","Get the full story on all of this and much more - read the full edition of today's Century Report here: https://sharedsapience.com/century-report/the-century-report-july-9-2026/","#futuretech #AI #innovation #robotics #TheCenturyReport"]
aweme_info.desc: July 9th, 2026 - an intense day for global technology and medicine. OpenAI is finally rolling out GPT-5.6 after months of federal review, signaling a massive leap in accessible AI capabilities. Meanwhile, China is accelerating its semiconductor independence, with domestic chip suppliers now capturing nearly half of the market budget. In other breakthroughs, the integration of robotics into medicine hits a milestone as humanoid robots complete their first systematic laparoscopic surgery trials. Plus, Meta is blurring lines with its new image generator, while Fortera marks a major shift in autonomous defense tech on the ground in Ukraine. Whether it is psilocybin treatment efficacy or the Treasury Department’s warning about a potential AI market bubble, the pace of change is compounding. Watch the full episode here: https://youtu.be/6siDevxZPVs Get the full story on all of this and much more - read the full edition of today's Century Report here: https://sharedsapience.com/century-report/the-century-report-july-9-2026/ #futuretech #AI #innovation #robotics #TheCenturyReport

original_client_text.markup_text:
July 9th, 2026 - an intense day for global technology and medicine. OpenAI is finally rolling out GPT-5.6 after months of federal review, signaling a massive leap in accessible AI capabilities. Meanwhile, China is accelerating its semiconductor independence, with domestic chip suppliers now capturing nearly half of the market budget.
In other breakthroughs, the integration of robotics into medicine hits a milestone as humanoid robots complete their first systematic laparoscopic surgery trials. Plus, Meta is blurring lines with its new image generator, while Fortera marks a major shift in autonomous defense tech on the ground in Ukraine. Whether it is psilocybin treatment efficacy or the Treasury Department’s warning about a potential AI market bubble, the pace of change is compounding.
Watch the full episode here: https://youtu.be/6siDevxZPVs
Get the full story on all of this and much more - read the full edition of today's Century Report here: https://sharedsapience.com/century-report/the-century-report-july-9-2026/
#futuretech #AI #innovation #robotics #TheCenturyReport

aweme_info.desc: GPT-5.6 viene en tres tamaños, y cada uno es para algo distinto: ☀️ **Sol** — el bestia, para agentes y tareas ambiciosas. 🌍 **Terra** — el equilibrado para el día a día. 🌙 **Luna** — rápido y barato para mucho volumen. ¿Y los números? Sol Ultra se pone primero en TerminalBench (91,9%), por delante de Claude y Gemini. Pero ojo: **Claude Mythos 5 se queda pegadísimo (88%)** y esto cambia cada semana. Mi consejo para tu negocio: no te obsesiones con el nº1 del ranking. El truco no es usar el modelo más potente, es usar el **adecuado para cada trabajo** — y muchas veces el "mediano" te sobra y te ahorra una pasta. Guarda esto para no perder el hilo. Y dime: ¿con cuál te quedas, Sol, Terra o Luna? 👇 Sígueme @donpablo.ai para IA al día, sin humo. #inteligenciaartificial #IA #openai #chatgpt #gpt5

original_client_text.markup_text:
GPT-5.6 viene en tres tamaños, y cada uno es para algo distinto:

☀️ **Sol** — el bestia, para agentes y tareas ambiciosas.
🌍 **Terra** — el equilibrado para el día a día.
🌙 **Luna** — rápido y barato para mucho volumen.

¿Y los números? Sol Ultra se pone primero en TerminalBench (91,9%), por delante de Claude y Gemini. Pero ojo: **Claude Mythos 5 se queda pegadísimo (88%)** y esto cambia cada semana.

Mi consejo para tu negocio: no te obsesiones con el nº1 del ranking. El truco no es usar el modelo más potente, es usar el **adecuado para cada trabajo** — y muchas veces el "mediano" te sobra y te ahorra una pasta.

Guarda esto para no perder el hilo. Y dime: ¿con cuál te quedas, Sol, Terra o Luna? 👇

Sígueme @donpablo.ai para IA al día, sin humo.

#inteligenciaartificial #IA #openai #chatgpt #gpt5
